nodes.name: Cercotrichas
nodes.summary: Cercotrichas（Cercotrichas）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联5种鸟类，如Black scrub robin、棕薮鸲、Kalahari scrub robin等5种鸟类。

nodes.name: Brown-backed scrub robin
nodes.summary: The brown-backed scrub robin (Cercotrichas hartlaubi) is a species of bird in the family Muscicapidae. It is found in Angola, Burundi, Cameroon, Central African Republic, Democratic Republic of the Congo, Kenya, Nigeria, Rwanda, Tanzania, and Uganda. Its natural habitat is moist savanna. References
